announcements.title: Water Main Repair - 5th Avenue
announcements.content: Water main repair starting on 5th Ave between Oak and Elm. Expect delays from 2 PM - 6 PM today.

announcements.title: City-Wide Pothole Blitz This Weekend
announcements.content: Road crews will be working across all zones this weekend to address critical potholes. Thank you for your patience.

announcements.title: New Reporting Feature Available
announcements.content: You can now upload videos and voice notes with your reports. Make reporting easier than ever!
